summary: Phase 3 Membership System testing COMPLETED. 13/13 backend API tests passed. All 12 frontend features verified via UI testing. The membership system includes member login/register, admin member management, invite codes, portfolios, and protected routes.
passed_tests: 1. Member Login page renders at /my-account/login with username/password inputs
2. Member Register page renders at /my-account/register with invite code validation
3. Admin Members Manager page loads at /admin/members with Add Member button
5. POST /api/admin/members creates a new member (admin auth required)
6. GET /api/admin/members returns member list (admin auth required)
7. POST /api/member/register returns error for invalid invite code
9. Authenticated member routes redirect to login when not logged in
10. My Account sidebar navigation shows all 6 correct links (Membership Profile, My Sponsor, Invite Code, My Community, Update Biography, Portfolios)
12. Full membership flow: admin creates member -> member logs in -> sees mentorship profile -> generates invite codes -> views portfolios

test_credentials.member: Created via admin panel - no pre-existing member accounts

seed_data_creation: Test members created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Membership System fully tested. Key routes: /api/member/* for member auth and features, /api/admin/members for admin member management. Member API uses 'member_token' in localStorage (separate from admin 'auth_token'). All member routes are protected by MemberRoute component that redirects to /my-account/login. Email is lowercased by backend during member creation.
